spacing.reason: No public page currently uses breakpoint-prefixed spacing utilities; enable this family when responsive spacing enters authored markup.

display.reason: No public page currently uses breakpoint-prefixed display utilities; enable this family before adding one to markup.

flexDirection.reason: No public page currently uses breakpoint-prefixed flex-direction utilities; enable this family before adding one to markup.

textAlign.reason: No public page currently uses breakpoint-prefixed text-alignment utilities; enable this family before adding one to markup.

width.reason: No public page currently uses breakpoint-prefixed width utilities; enable this family before adding one to markup.

columns.reason: Emit only the responsive column spans used by current public markup; extend the allowlist before introducing another span.

grid.reason: Emit only the breakpoint grid variants used by the live Mercury documentation example.

principles: Utilities are token-backed unless the value is structural.
Utilities are selector-stable and may be used in authored markup.
Generated output is compact; edit this config and the generator instead of hand-editing utilities.generated.css.
